prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance athlete requiring 3000+ calories with carbohydrate loading and hydration optimization

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories across all meals and snacks
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total daily calories
Includes specific hydration strategy with fluid intake recommendations
Plan is compact and covers breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks for one day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategies

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and strength for competitive weightlifting

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus pre/post-workout nutrition
Protein intake is at least 1.6g per kg of body weight (136g minimum)
Post-workout meal includes carbs and protein within 1-2 hours of training
Macronutrient ratios support strength gains (protein 30-35%, carbs 45-50%, fats 15-20%)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power sport athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals with specific macronutrient ratios and recovery nutrition timing

prompt_inputs.goal: High-intensity endurance cycling training (120+ minutes daily)

solution_criteria: All meals and snacks are completely plant-based with no animal products
Meal plan provides adequate protein (minimum 1.2g per kg body weight) from plant sources
Includes carbohydrate-rich foods appropriate for endurance athlete energy needs
Plan is compact and covers all meals for one full day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan endurance cyclist) requiring complete plant-based nutrition that meets performance and ethical requirements
